videos.title: From Growth to Jobs: Making Industrial Policy Work for South Asia
videos.description:
South Asia remains the world’s fastest-growing region. But sustaining growth is not enough. The key question is how to translate growth into more and better jobs.

Governments across the region are increasingly using industrial policy to shape economic outcomes. The latest South Asia Economic Update from the World Bank Group examines how these policies are working—and what reforms are needed to improve results.

This discussion brings together economists and policy experts to explore how South Asia can accelerate growth, strengthen competitiveness, and expand job opportunities in a challenging global environment. 

Watch the replay: https://live.worldbank.org/en/event/2026/growth-to-jobs-industrial-policy-south-asia?cid=ECR_YT_worldbank_EN_EXT #southasiadevelopment 

👤SPEAKERS
- Nagesh Kumar, Director and Chief Executive, Institute for Studies in Industrial Development (ISID)
External Member, Monetary Policy Committee, Reserve Bank of India
- Dushni Weerakoon, Executive Director, Institute of Policy Studies of Sri Lanka
- Shanta Devarajan, Professor of the Practice of International Development, Georgetown University
Former Senior Director for Development Economics, World Bank Group
- Johannes Zutt, Vice President for the South Asia Region, The World Bank 
- Franziska Ohnsorge, Chief Economist for South Asia, World Bank Group
- Moderator: Parikshit Luthra, Director of Policy and Government Partnerships, Convergence Foundation

CHAPTERS
00:00 Intro video
01:23 Opening remarks by Parikshit Luthra (event moderator)
03:09 A conversation with Franziska Ohnsorge
10:59 Fireside chat between Shanta Devarajan and Johannes Zutt
28:18 Panel discussion with Nagesh Kumar, Dushni Weerakoon, Franziska Ohnsorge

💬 Subtitles (CC) available in English with AI-generated translation into 100+ languages.

🔔 Sign up to receive updates about upcoming events: http://wrld.bg/cxHK50W56x3
▶️ Watch more event recordings: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE9mrcoX-oE-2f1BL-iPPoQ/streams/streams

videos.title: Health, Security and Development: Voices from the One Health Summit | Lyon 2026
videos.description:
At the G7 One Health Summit in Lyon, world leaders gathered around an urgent message: a health risk can become a global security crisis at a moment's notice. And we are only safe if everyone is safe. This film captures the voices of Aki Nishio, World Bank VP for Development Finance, and other world leaders and health experts who came together to make the case for investing in health systems — before the next health crisis, not after. Since 2021, the World Bank Group has committed approximately $4 billion across 34 One Health projects spanning health, agriculture, and the environment. And the WBG's International Development Association or IDA has been crucial to this work, bringing financing, technical expertise, and boots on the ground to low-income countries that need it most. Learn more: http://wrld.bg/WhWa50YRcVW

00:00 Opening: The duty to prepare
00:17 Lyon: G7 One Health Summit
00:41 The health-security link
01:27 The funding crisis and ODA cuts
01:37 Why IDA's leverage model matters
02:43 World Bank Group's One Health commitment

videos.title: تحديات الصراع والسياسات الصناعية من أجل التنمية
videos.description:
ما هي أحدث المستجدات الاقتصادية لمنطقة الشرق الأوسط وشمال أفريقيا وأفغانستان وباكستان؟ كيف يؤثر الصراع المستمر على النمو والتضخم والاستقرار الاقتصادي في مختلف أنحاء المنطقة؟ ما هي التداعيات على الدول التي تواجه ارتفاع أسعار الطاقة وتراجع حجم التجارة وتصاعد حالة عدم اليقين؟ وعلى نطاق أوسع، كيف يمكن لاقتصادات المنطقة تعزيز قدرتها على الصمود والحفاظ على مسار النمو في مواجهة هذه التحديات؟

انضموا إلى رئيسة الخبراء الاقتصاديين لمنطقة الشرق الأوسط وشمال أفريقيا وأفغانستان وباكستان في البنك الدولي، روبرتا غاتي، وعدد من الخبراء، في نقاش مباشر لإطلاق آخر تحديث اقتصادي للمنطقة – أبريل 2026 بعنوان " تحديات الصراع والسياسات الصناعية من أجل التنمية ".

ALBANKALDAWLI.ORG/LIVE

http://wrld.bg/A2Eg50X8LYS
 شاهد الفعاليات السابقة:  
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-BKIMAuPetY&list=PL5E7BABB475E47699 

🌐 تعد مجموعة البنك الدولي واحدة من أكبر مصادر التمويل والمعرفة في العالم بالنسبة للبلدان المنخفضة الدخل. تشترك مؤسساتها الخمس في الإلتزام بالحد من الفقر وزيادة الرخاء المشترك وتعزيز التنمية المستدامة. http://www.albankaldawli.org

videos.title: Challenges of Conflict, Industrial Policy for Development in MENAAP Region
videos.description:
What is the economic outlook for the Middle East, North Africa, Afghanistan, and Pakistan (MENAAP) region? How is the ongoing conflict affecting growth, inflation, and economic stability across the region? What are the implications for countries facing rising energy prices, declining trade, and heightened uncertainty? And, more broadly, how can economies in the region strengthen resilience and sustain growth amid these challenges?

Join the World Bank Group Chief Economist for MENAAP, Roberta Gatti, and other experts for a live discussion on the launch of the April 2026 MENAAP Economic Update “Challenges of Conflict and Industrial Policies for Development” to learn more about the latest economic trends, risks, and policy priorities shaping the region. Visit the event page: https://live.worldbank.org/en/event/2026/challenges-conflict-industrial-policy-development-middle-east-north-africa-afghanistan-pakistan?cid=ECR_YT_Worldbank_EN_EXT

Join the conversation online #MENAAPUpdate

CHAPTERS
01:14 Report Presentation: Conflict and economic impact
24:56 Panel discussion begins
54:00 Closing remarks and key takeaways

videos.title: Strengthening IDA21 With Hybrid Capital
videos.description:
What exactly is Hybrid Capital—and why is it described as sitting between a loan and a grant? 

In this episode exploring IDA's innovative financing tools, Elaine Su, Senior Financial Officer, in the Development Finance Vice Presidency of the World Bank Group, explains how Hybrid Capital works, how it differs from loans and grants, and how it can help IDA scale financing to support countries most in need.

Hybrid Capital is a perpetual instrument with both debt and equity features, designed to strengthen IDA’s capital position and support increased development financing. Learn how it functions, why it matters for IDA21, and what it could mean for partners, including foundations and philanthropies, seeking to amplify development impact. Learn more:  http://wrld.bg/MGm550YQApl

0:00-0:32: Introduction
0:33-1:38: What is hybrid capital, how it differs from a loan or a grant
1:39-2:50: How it strengthens IDA to do what it couldn’t before
2:51-3:27: How it benefits countries receiving IDA support
3:28-3:58: Explained in one sentence - the value of hybrid capital
3:59-4:21:  Wrap-up

videos.title: IDA21 & Jobs: How Uzbekistan is Scaling Employment (Spring Meetings 2026) - Talking Development
videos.description:
Uzbekistan jobs, youth employment, and economic growth are the focus of this conversation, recorded during the World Bank Group and IMF Spring Meetings 2026. In this mini‑episode of Talking Developmen, Anna Bjerde sits down with Jamshid Kuchkarov, Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Economy and Finance of Uzbekistan, to discuss how the country is preparing for a fast‑growing labor force—and what it means to host the IDA21 Mid‑Term Review later in 2026.

Uzbekistan’s population is young, with 500,000+ youth entering the labor market each year. This conversation explores the government’s priorities for job creation and upward mobility, including skills and education, capabilities for the digital/new economy (AI and computer science), and the role of rural opportunity, agriculture, tourism, and foundational infrastructure—especially reliable energy supply. We also look at why IDA financing has mattered for Uzbekistan’s reforms and how countries can transition from IDA recipient to blend financing (IDA + IBRD). 

Chapters
00:00 Welcome to the Spring Meetings 2026
00:45 The youth jobs challenge in Uzbekistan
01:14 Skills, AI and the new economy
01:56 Rural jobs: agriculture and tourism
02:23 Infrastructure and sustainable energy for jobs
03:07 Why Uzbekistan is hosting the IDA21 Midterm Review
03:42 How IDA supported Uzbekistan’s reforms (blended financing)
05:02 Closing reflections on jobs and IDA

#IDA #Jobs #YouthEmployment #Uzbekistan #DevelopmentFinance

videos.title: Preventing Crisis, Strengthening Security: How IDA Supports Global Stability
videos.description:
As instability rises and aid budgets shrink, the World Bank Group's International Development Association (IDA) stands out as a strategic investment. By tackling the root causes of fragility, IDA unlocks opportunity, prevents crises before they start, and strengthens security for everyone. Hear from global leaders on why IDA remains one of the most effective tools we have for building a more stable world.

00:00  The need for development and diplomacy
00:21  Why prevention is more cost-effective than response
00:46  IDA's role in global security
01:28  How IDA pools resources for greater impact
02:10  Why fragile contexts need concessional finance
02:22  Supporting children in fragile states

ABOUT US 🌐 The World Bank Group (WBG) is one of the world’s largest sources of funding and knowledge for low-income countries.
